ObservabilityWorkbench_Description: Long-retention monitoring, cross-item correlation, SLO tracking, and proactive alerting for Microsoft Fabric workspaces.
ObservabilityWorkbench_Hub_Slogan: Full observability for your Fabric data platform.
ObservabilityWorkbench_Hub_Description:
Observability Workbench extends Microsoft Fabric with long-retention telemetry, cross-item correlation, SLO dashboards, and proactive alert rules.

**You can:**

- Retain monitoring hub events beyond the 30-day native limit.
- Correlate pipeline runs with downstream notebook, dataflow, and semantic model refreshes.
- Define SLOs for data freshness, success rate, and duration regression.
- Configure alert rules with proactive breach detection.
ObservabilityWorkbench_Hub_GetStarted_1_: Set up long-retention monitoring in minutes
Create your first Workbench Dashboard to start collecting and correlating Fabric monitoring events with extended retention.
WorkbenchDashboard_Description: A unified observability dashboard showing cross-item correlation, SLO status, and incident timelines for your Fabric workspace.
SLODefinition_Description: Define service level objectives for data freshness, pipeline success rate, and duration regression across Fabric items.
AlertRule_Description: Configure alert rules with proactive breach detection for monitoring Fabric pipeline, notebook, and dataflow health.
